title: Crystal Gacha
description: Add the gacha from ARK: Survival Evolved
body:
### **THIS MOD REQUIRES GECKOLIB**

# about
Adds the gacha from ARK: Survival Evolved (**Not exactly the same, just an inspiration**)

# features
Find gachas on dark forests and lush caves.

shift + right click with an item in hand to give it to eat.

When gacha eats enough he will drop a crystal that when you right click with it in hand, will drop a random item that will have the rarity of the crystal (common, uncommon, rare, epic). Also there is a chance (configurable) to get a better crystal.

Depending on what you give to eat to the gacha, he will drop a better crystal. (depending on de rarity of the item).

# highly configurable
Mod have a confing file on .minecraft/config/gacha-config.toml, can open it with notepad, visual studio or any other editor that you like.

Here you can blacklist items that you don't want to be dropped by gacha crystals.
By default, there are items like bedrock, command block, etc. **Can add any item of any mod**.

Also, can configure the gacha spawn.
